name: voxclaw
description: Give Codex a voice with the VoxClaw macOS app, CLI, and local HTTP listener.

interface.longDescription: Use the VoxClaw macOS app, CLI, or local listener to turn task summaries and failures into spoken audio.
defaultPrompt: Use VoxClaw to read a short final task summary aloud.
Use VoxClaw to announce important test failures aloud.
